text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Arima Kinen, the racecourse is
packed with spectators who've been looking
forward to the showdown between the BNW trio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket tells Narita Taishin and Biwa
Hayahide that she's pumped and ready to go for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the runners dash off onto the track, they are
welcomed by thunderous cheers.
